subject: grammar
title: Pronouns and There (Space Exploration Dialogue)
instruction: Fill in the gaps with a suitable pronoun or there.
passage:
Teacher: Do you think that governments spend too much on space exploration nowadays?

Student: Well, I think that [1] are a lot of different factors to take into consideration. For example some countries want to show the rest of the world that [2] are successful and [3] can do this with a space exploration program. [4] seems that [5] is more important for these countries to impress the world than to look after their own people. Sometimes [6] is difficult to understand this because every country in the world has [7] problems and has poor people that need to be looked after because they can't look after [8]. So, yes, I do think that these countries should look after people first before [9] start trying to send men to the moon! [10] are too many other problems here on earth that we need to sort out.

questions.text: Well, I think that ___ are a lot of different factors to take into consideration.
For example some countries want to show the rest of the world that ___ are successful...
...and ___ can do this with a space exploration program.
___ seems that it is more important for these countries to impress the world...
It seems that ___ is more important for these countries to impress the world than to look after their own people.
Sometimes ___ is difficult to understand this because every country in the world has its problems...
...every country in the world has ___ problems and has poor people that need to be looked after...
So, yes, I do think that these countries should look after people first before ___ start trying to send men to the moon!
___ are too many other problems here on earth that we need to sort out.
